title: Cosmic Inventors
description: A creative modpack for making Valkyrien Skies vehicles, including Starlance spaceships.
body:
The modpack for the Beep Boop Central Cosmic Horizons event. Build boats, cars, planes, and rockets, and explore outer space! With several create and vs addons, and a bunch of building mods to add detail and variety.

---

### Main Mods:
- Cosmic Horizons
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
- Starlance
- Valkyrien Skies

### Addons:
- Beyond The Stars
- Chemica
- Clockwork
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Factory Logistics
- Create Optical
- Create:: Bits 'n' Bobs
- Create: Connected
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Create: Framed
- Create: Interactive
- More Girder
- Create: New Age
- Create: Prismatic Shine
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Create: Vintage
- Petrol's Parts
- Trackwork
